scope: worktree feat/change-0007-hygiene-pack uncommitted vs main (git diff + untracked)

findings.message: Hook reads body_lint mode from WORKTREE docs/ai/docs-audit.yaml while linting STAGED blobs; unstaged config edit downgrades enforce->report-only (SPEC-0011 F2 class on the config input). Mirrors pre-existing close_gate behavior (D3-frozen).

Unquoted 'for f in $STAGED_GOVERNED_DOCS' word-splits filenames with spaces; git show fails per fragment and the loop continues silently -> dirty staged doc commits even under body_lint: enforce. Same pattern in close_gate loop.

CommonMark divergences: (a) multi-line inline code span content is falsely flagged (per-line masking); (b) line-initial two-run code span (``` x ```) misread as fence open -> spurious unbalanced-fence + swallows the rest of the doc (false-negative cascade). Latent only: real corpus clean.
findings.disposition: promote to follow-up intake (lintBody CommonMark edge hardening)

findings.message: Staged-vs-scope audit aborts/resets any staged path outside the derived scope list, but SKILL_CODE_REVIEW H4 mandates staging docs/ai/reviews/* with the scope's commit; only INDEX files are whitelisted companions -> agent following both prompts unstages the review reports (they re-orphan).
findings.disposition: remediate in-scope (extend expected-companions to docs/ai run artifacts / code_review.report_paths) or promote to follow-up

findings.message: Stray tag in fence info string (```</content>) never linted (fence-open lines exempt). Contrived; accepted.
Hook governed set diverges from scanAuditDocs: plans skipped unconditionally, non-ID docs linted, scan_exclude ignored. D3 literal wording sanctions it.
--quick --strict still promotes bodyLint to hardFail; surprising but no caller combines them.
Loose greps: TEST-011 'push' and TEST-010 forbidden-string presence add no discriminating power; RED-proof carried by stricter anchors. Suite bash-3.2 clean.
Fence-open regex accepts 4+ space indentation (CommonMark: indented code). Latent phantom-fence shape; corpus clean.
Partial-flush reset leaves current_focus on the flushed ref while other items remain; matches frozen D6; next planning overwrites.

verdict_notes: No ERRORs; Stage 1 compliant. Conditional PASS per H6: WARNING-4 recommended for in-scope one-line remediation before PR; WARNING-1/2/3 to be promoted to follow-up refs at closeout and named in code_review.notes.
